title: Pleurothallis mazei
taxonomy: Pleurothallis mazei is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, and Pleurothallis mazei falls under the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Pleurothallis itself is a group of orchids native to the Americas, characterized by their small, delicate flowers and unique growth habits. Pleurothallis mazei is specifically a species of orchid that is native to Central and South America, where it grows in a variety of habitats. By classifying Pleurothallis mazei within the Orchidaceae family, scientists can better understand its evolutionary history and relationships to other orchid species.
